meaning: n.&vt.ation/`ImjJnEJpr[鐢焆鍏嶇柅娌夋穩鍙嶅簲//I9sIpI`teIFLn/n.[鐢焆鍏嶇柅娌夋穩鍙嶅簲
examples: When the immunoprecipitate was subjected to SDS agarose gel electrophoresis, 3 radioactive bands were obtained, one of which corresponded to pure human albumin in its position.
Methods: The co immunoprecipitation assay was employed to isolate TRF1 protein complex and the immunoprecipitate was subjected to MALDI TOF mass spectrometry for protein identification.
